finding: Slovak turnover remains negative despite 13 pp improvement in wave 39
bullets: A net 13% of Slovak firms (n=242) reported falling turnover in wave 39, improving by 13.39 pp from the prior quarter's net 26%—yet still trailing the EA's net 8% increase.
A net 34% of Slovak firms (n=242) reported declining profits, improving 5.42 pp from a net 40% in wave 38—compared with a net 15% reporting profit declines across the EA.
Labour costs continued to rise for a net 79% of Slovak firms (n=242), easing 4.81 pp from the prior quarter but remaining 19.85 pp above the EA's net 59%—adding pressure on margins.
chart_subtitle: Slovak turnover net balance rose to -12.83% in wave 39.
